bird.name: 黑腹燕鸥
bird.summary: 黑腹燕鸥（学名：Chlidonias acuticauda）为鸥科浮鷗屬的鸟类。在中国大陆，分布于云南等地。该物种的模式产地在印度。 参考文献

relations.subject: 黑腹燕鸥
relations.evidence: Its typical habitat is lowland rivers and marshes, and sometimes ditches and pools, at altitudes of up to about . It is an entirely inland species and is not found on the coast
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 黑腹燕鸥
relations.evidence: The best estimate of the remaining population, as of 2022, is 900 – 1,100 mature individuals. The threats it faces include the degradation of the islands and sandspits on which it breeds, the collection of eggs for food, predation of eggs and chicks by dogs, cats and crows, flooding of nesting sites by the construction of river dams, competition for fish by local fishermen, entanglement in nets, disturbance, extraction of water, sand and gravel dredging and pollution
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: 黑腹燕鸥
relations.evidence: The best estimate of the remaining population, as of 2022, is 900 – 1,100 mature individuals. The threats it faces include the degradation of the islands and sandspits on which it breeds, the collection of eggs for food, predation of eggs and chicks by dogs, cats and crows, flooding of nesting sites by the construction of river dams, competition for fish by local fishermen, entanglement in nets, disturbance, extraction of water, sand and gravel dredging and pollution
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
